Bois, John  story
memoryArtifacts.description: John Boys was born in 1394 in Devon, England, the son of John. He married Agnes Sarah Browne in his hometown. They had four children during their marriage. He died in 1431 in England at the age of 37. …

zh.Goodnestone, Kent, England, United Kingd: 英國英格蘭肯特古德內斯同

zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Bois於1400年出生在英國英格蘭肯特古德內斯同時，他的父親William de Bois67歲，母親Elizabeth92歲。他於1427年與Agnes在英國肯特古德內斯同結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1472年在英國英格蘭素可瓦度爾斯特享年72歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Bois于1400年出生在英国英格兰肯特古德內斯同时，他的父亲William de Bois67岁，母亲Elizabeth92岁。他于1427年与Agnes在英国肯特古德內斯同结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1472年在英国英格兰素可瓦度爾斯特享年72岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bois
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alcide, Antoine, Donat, Marcel, Ovide, Ovila, Raoul, Serge.

French: topographic name for someone living or working in a wood, from (Old) French bois ‘wood’ (from Late Latin boscum ‘bush, shrub, undergrowth’, of ancient Germanic origin), or a habitational name from (Le) Bois, the name of several places in various parts of France. This surname is also found in Haiti. Compare Debois and the most frequent French form Dubois . Compare also Boie , Boies , and Boyce .
English: variant of   Boyce   and   Boyes  .

variants.name: Dubois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Normand, Jacques, Pierre, Fernand, Marcel, Emile, Lucien, Michel, Alain, Luc.

French, Walloon, and English (of French Huguenot origin): topographic name, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’, for someone living or working in a wood (see Bois ), or a habitational name for someone from any of several places in various parts of France and in Belgium (Wallonia) named Le Bois. This is the most frequent surname in Wallonia. It is also found in the Flemish part of Belgium, the Netherlands, Germany, and Haiti. In both England and North America it is sometimes translated into English as Wood . Compare Deboe , Debois , Deboy , Duboise , and Dubose .

History: This surname is listed (in the form Du Bois) in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America. One of the several Huguenot ancestors bearing this name was Chrétien Du Bois from Flanders, whose son, Louis Du Bois (born 1626 in Lille, France, died 1696 in Kingston, NY), was among the Huguenots who founded the town of New Paltz, NY 1675–78.

variants.name: Boisvert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Armand, Andre, Donat, Lucien, Jacques, Gaston, Normand, Pierre, Gilles, Herve, Adrien.
French:
topographic name for someone who lived in a dense forest or perhaps a copse of evergreens, from Old French bois ‘wood’ (see Bois ) + vert, verd ‘green’.

variants.name: Boisclair
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Marcel, Aldege, Alphonse, Arsene, Edmour, Emile, Leopaul, Prudent, Rejean, Remi, Yves.

French: topographic name from Old French bois ‘wood’ (see Bois ) + clair ‘clear, light’, or a habitational name from (Le) Bois Clair, the name of several places in various parts of France. This surname is virtually non-existing in France.

variants.name: Boies
meanings: Altered form of French   Bois  .

variants.name: Baskerville
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Boscherville in Eure, France, named with Old Anglo-Norman French boschet ‘copse, thicket’ (a diminutive of Bois ) + ville ‘settlement, town’.

variants.name: Debois
meanings: Altered form of French   Dubois  , a cognate of 1 above.
French: topographic name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, for someone living or working in a wood (see Bois ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament: ‘God is gracious’. See John .

en.lifeSummary: When John de Bois was born in 1400, in Goodnestone, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Bois, was 67 and his mother, Elizabeth, was 92. He married Agnes in 1427, in Goodnestone, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died in 1472, in Wadhurst, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72, and was buried in Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Bois est né en 1400, à Goodnestone, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Bois, avait 67 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth, avait 92 ans. Il a épousé Agnes en 1427, à Goodnestone, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1472, à Wadhurst, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Bois 1400 in Goodnestone, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Bois 67 und seine Mutter Elizabeth 92. Er hat 1427 in Goodnestone, Kent, England Agnes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1472 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Wadhurst, Sussex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Bois è nato il nel 1400 nel Goodnestone, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Bois, aveva 67 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth, aveva 92 anni. Lui sposato Agnes nel 1427, nel Goodnestone, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1472, nel Wadhurst, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Boisが1400年にイギリスイギリスケントグドネストーンで生まれた時，父William de Boisは67歳，母Elizabethは92歳であった。1427年にイギリスケントグドネストーンでAgnesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1472年にイギリスイギリススセックスワドハルストで72歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Bois(이)가 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 구드네스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Bois(은)는 67세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth(은)는 92세였다. 그는 1427년 영국 켄트 구드네스톤에서 Agnes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1472년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 와드후르스트에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Bois nasceu em 1400, em Goodnestone, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Bois, tinha 67 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth, tinha 92 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes em 1427, em Goodnestone, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1472, em Wadhurst, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Bois родился в 1400 г. в местности гуднестоун, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Bois было 67 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth, 92. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes в 1427 г. в местности гуднестоун, кэнт, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1472 г. в местности вадхурст, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Bois nació en 1400, en Goodnestone, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Bois, tenía 67 años y su mamá, Elizabeth, tenía 92 años. Se casó con Agnes en 1427, en Goodnestone, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1472, en Wadhurst, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
